records.title: Chaotic Craftsman Worships The Cube
records.synopsis: Summoned after an unfortunate accident in hopes they could protect the world from a coming threat, Ben and his classmates are gifted another chance at life. With fame and fortune promised to whoever is willing to fight for the sake of the world it doesn't seem like a bad deal, there's just one small problem. Ben wasn't blessed with any magic or combat skills, just crafting and enchanting. While the skills themselves aren't useless they also aren't seen as being necessary to the coming war. Now not needed and alone Ben tries to find a place in the world while meeting some of its colourful characters along the way.

records.title: Path to Transcendence
records.synopsis: A second chance. An opportunity to delve down the Path to Transcendence, where Tiers and Skills reign supreme.

records.title: (B1 STUBBING mid-June!!!) Runeblade: A Delving & Skill Merging LitRPG
records.synopsis: Kaius just wanted to unlock his class - instead, he restarted the apocalypse.

records.title: Sky Pride
records.synopsis: What does it take to climb out of the trash and into the sky?

records.title: The Runesmith
records.synopsis: Other Novel you might like: Heavy Metal [ A Monster Evolution LitRPG ]

records.title: Super Supportive
records.synopsis: This story is about: The daily life of a teenager named Alden. He's growing up, slowly growing his powers, and figuring out who he really wants to be in a universe with Systems, superheroes, and extraterrestrial wizards.

records.title: Cultivation System: Elder Edition
records.synopsis: [Action + System + Comedy + MC teaches protagonist disciples + Isekai + Cultivation]

records.title: The Hundred Reigns [Timeloop LitRPG]
records.synopsis: A hundred tries to get it right. No more, no less.

records.title: Five Element Overlord: I Can Upgrade Everything!
records.synopsis: Li Hao is transmigrated into a Xianxia Cultivation World , and thrust into the life of a servant in the Azure Cloud Sect.

records.title: Becoming the Dark Lord [LitRPG]
records.synopsis: “I Became the Dark Lord”

records.title: The Archmage Coefficient (OP Archmage/ Mage Academy/ LITRPG/ Hidden Genius)
records.synopsis: Magic was chaos. Now it’s chemistry.

records.title: MMA: Magic Martial Arts [Baby Reincarnation, Progression]
records.synopsis: Who needs spells when you have perfectly functional fists?

records.title: Ghost in the City: Cyberpunk Gamer SI
records.synopsis: [This story has not been published on Amazon by me. Any copies found there are stolen]

records.title: Stray Cat Strut [Stubbing in 10⁷⁸ years!]
records.synopsis: In the year 2057, the world has become a corporate-run utopia for the super-rich, and a hellhole for all the rest.

records.title: Immortality Starts With Investment [XIANXIA LITRPG]
records.synopsis: STAFF NOTE: The author had proven ownership. RighteousEgg is the original author. I have added a pinned comment to the first chapter to show this staff note is legitimate. A lost soul from Earth crossed over to a cultivation world, and his new identity was a member of a small Qi Refining family. The original owner not only had poor cultivation talent but was also a simp, giving all his resources to a female cultivator. Fortunately, he now has a system that, as long as he gives gifts to the female cultivator, will return tenfold, a hundredfold, or even thousands of times the value to him. Alright, Ye Chen would never admit he was a simp; he was just making an investment!

records.title: Ave Xia Rem Y
records.synopsis: A V ery Clich e Xian xia Ha rem Stor y !

records.title: Cultivation is Creation
records.synopsis: Ke Yin has a problem. Well, several problems.

records.title: Penitent
records.synopsis: Michael didn't want to die. He didn't deserve to die. After a lost battle with cancer that started only a year after he retired, he'd lived what many people would call a full life, but it wasn't enough. He wanted more time. Time with his wife. Time with his kids. Time with his grandkids. When he found himself drawn toward the light, he fought his way away from it. Unfortunately, that didn't take him back to the life he wanted to live.

records.title: The Gift of Loot
records.synopsis: He who has the most loot, wins.

records.title: A Novel Concept - He Who Eludes Death
records.synopsis: Can you get used to dying? He has to.

records.title: Explorer of Edregon (Book 5 Complete!)
records.synopsis: The universe is dying. Thank God there’s a backup plan.

records.title: Naruto: The Outsider's Resolve [OC-SI, Gradual Progression]
records.synopsis: [A Naruto "OC-SI"Fan Fiction]

records.title: Trinity of Magic [Progression Fantasy]
records.synopsis: WHAT WOULD YOU GIVE FOR POWER? HOW MUCH WOULD YOU SACRIFICE?

records.title: Tales of the Endless Empire [LitRPG Apocalypse]
records.synopsis: A bloodmage born in shadows, a shapeshifter no one can predict, a survivor in a world set against him.

records.title: Mother of Learning
records.synopsis: Zorian is a teenage mage of humble birth and slightly above-average skill, attending his third year of education at Cyoria's magical academy. He is a driven and irritable young man, consumed by a desire to ensure his own future and free himself of the influence of his family, whom he resents for favoring his brothers over him. Consequently, he has no time for pointless distractions or paying attention to other people's problems.

records.title: Tyrants of Earth - A LitRPG misadventure
records.synopsis: All Ryan ever wanted to do was become an adventurer.

records.title: Death After Death (Roguelike Isekai)
records.synopsis: When Simon dies, it turns out there's more to combat than lightning reflexes with his controller, and the path to becoming a hero is more brutal than he can imagine as he descends into The Pit . Death after Death is a dark, time loop/Isesaki story with roguelike elements, that explores some of the common tropes in a different light.

records.title: The Perfect Run
records.synopsis: The Perfect Run is now available on Amazon and Audible : Volume 1 ( Audiobook ) , Volume 2 ( Audiobook) , Volume 3

records.title: Chronicles of an Isekai'd Legion: For the Glory of Rome [STUBBING 6/11 ~ 5 DAYS]
records.synopsis: A wise man once said all roads lead to Rome. He didn’t know how right he was.

records.title: Just Add Mana
records.synopsis: The more lives you've lived, the more mana you have, and Cale has lived too many lives to count.

records.title: Lazy Loops: An Idle LitRPG [Op to archmage]
records.synopsis: The harder you try, the faster you die.

records.title: My Only Familiar Is Me[A Late-Blooming Evolution Story]
records.synopsis: The world does not care about my mortgage.

records.title: The Allbright System - A Sci-Fi Progression LitRPG Story
records.synopsis: I am not currently publishing this Novel anywhere. Not on Amazon or any other similar website.

records.title: The God of Death Just Wants to Quit?! [Isekai / OP MC / LitRPG / Kingdom Building]
records.synopsis: Nerez no longer remembers the name he had when he was just an ordinary human on Earth. It has been far too long since a literal date with destiny, or rather with the Goddess of Fate, condemned him to wander the sea of souls through a thousand different lives.

records.title: Blessed by Death: An Archmage's Second Life [OP MC, LitRPG, Book 1 Complete!]
records.synopsis: Levi was once the servant of Death itself.

records.title: The Center for Dungeon Management, Book 1: Gate Crashers [5x Chapter Releases Weekly!]
records.synopsis: In the United States, the Center for Dungeon Management (CDM) manages anything related to gates, like licensing crawlers, enforcing harvester safety standards, and prosecuting gate crashers–people who enter gates without licenses and dungeon rights.

records.title: Ascension of the Primalist [A Tamer Class, LitRPG]
records.synopsis: To thrive as a Primalist, the hunt and pain must never end.

records.title: Paragon of Skills
records.synopsis: Jacob Cloud is sixteen, a miner’s son, and he knows his fate: die young, broke, and anonymous in the bowels of Shit’s Creek, a nowhere town that feeds silver ore to richer cities and spits out its sons in pine boxes. He dreams of more. In this world, Knights are one step above Adventurers—protectors, guides, and, most importantly, heroes. But to even try for a Knight’s life, you need gold, rare Skills, and connections Jacob will never have.

records.title: The Dungeon Without a System
records.synopsis: The unnamed main character wakes up as a Dungeon Core. Instead of being deep within the earth or in a cave, this newly-minted Dungeon Core finds himself drifting to the beach of an uncharted and uninhabited island.

records.title: Second Life as a Soldier [Book 1 Complete]
records.synopsis: He died a nobody. Now he’s reborn in a body beaten and left for dead, no family, no food, no future.

records.title: The Sovereign's Toll: a LitRPG/Isekai Adventure
records.synopsis: **BOOK 1 COMPLETE**

records.title: Stupid Sexy Cryptids [or How I Became the Emperor of Mankind]
records.synopsis: 22 year old electrical engineer Ash Clifford inherited his grandfather's gothic mansion in a small town of Cascade, Pacific Rim. Now he's looking for a job to pay the bills. The only problem is that a seven-foot, antlered cryptid girl invaded his life and won't leave. Oh, and he has to convince an alien warship armada that he's the God-Emperor of Mankind. Not a big deal at all, really. This is fine.

records.title: Blacksmith of the Apocalypse
records.synopsis: When not THE Apocalypse strikes, but all of them together, where will you be? What will you do? As Humanity faces its hardest time a playful god shows mercy(?) Follow Seth on his journey to somehow survive in whatever has become of his world. Also posting on Webnovel and Patreon ( https://www.patreon.com/blacksmithoftheapocalypse )

records.title: Paragon of Mana
records.synopsis: Ethan died, and was reborn into a world of Classes, Skills, and Mana.

records.title: Dungeon of Knowledge [Complete]
records.synopsis: Aliandra Amariel loved magic, dedicating her academic years to the study of runes and spells, pushing the boundaries of mana's infinite possibilities. Like most Fae, her destiny seemed clear until that fateful day of her Class Trial, when the Blind Lich unleashed an undead apocalypse on her home, the fabled underground city of Dal’mohra, and triggered The Breaking – a cataclysm that forever reshaped the world.

records.title: Dungeon Diver: Stealing A Monster’s Power
records.synopsis: A story following a young hunter named Jay. He has grown up in a world where dungeons, monsters, and humans with leveling systems are a cultural norm. At the age of 20, he awakens a skill that allows him to steal the abilities of monsters. While others are stuck with a specific skill set, he continues to grow stronger after every battle.

records.title: Memoirs of Your Local Small-time Villainess
records.synopsis: An editor at the prime of her life—and with maybe just a little too much free time—finds herself waking up in one of her favorite RPGs with no clue as to what's going on or how to get back home.

records.title: Myriad Rivers to the Sea
records.synopsis: In a world where the strength of one's awakened spirit determines your starting point, the orphaned Li Yu awakens a low grade spirit: a blood-red Koi fish, deemed a Grade One, Inferior spirit fit only for a decorative pond. Mocked for his misfortune and with no future in his village.

records.title: Reborn With a Magic System
records.synopsis: [Winner in the April 2025 Royal Road Writathon challenge]

records.title: When Immortal Ascension Fails Time Travel to Try Again
records.synopsis: What is my 1000-year-old monster self to do when I’ve failed my immortal ascension? Time travel — accidentally — and wind up back in my 9-year-old body, needing to re-cultivate, of course. But after that? Get REVENGE! Muahahahaha!

records.title: Pale Lights
records.synopsis: From the author of "A Practical Guide to Evil", comes the Pale Lights series.

records.title: Monarch Litrpg (Army fantasy)
records.synopsis: Rayne was a bastard, the only son of the fallen Duke Frayser, and cast aside to die in the army that hated him for being alive.

records.title: What? My “Information Club” is Actually an All-Knowing Secret Society?
records.synopsis: In the burning heat of Jakarta, Arlen is a broke car wash employee with one last hope, his unpublished novel The Frozen Era. Knowing that nobody reads books anymore, he decides to sell "experience".

records.title: Demonic City Builder [LitRPG, City & Kingdom Building]
records.synopsis: He filed 101 support tickets. The System turned him into a demon.

records.title: Unconquered Tower
records.synopsis: A hundred years ago thirteen towers arrived on Earth. At noon on the summer solstice, the tower gates open every year admitting any who wish to climb. Those who survive and come back do so with incredible powers and riches, tales of different worlds and mythical beings. Over the decades the worlds contained inside of the towers have leaked free, changing the Earth and her inhabitants, the land around the towers saturated with mana and life, growing great and wild.

records.title: The Fractured Tower [Book 1 Stubbing July 1st]
records.synopsis: Sorin was already a legend in his own time. He thought his journey was complete, but it’s only just begun.

records.title: Ar'Kendrithyst
records.synopsis: A social worker father and his adult daughter crash land on a desert full of crystal plants and little else. The city walls of Ar'Kendrithyst rise in the distance, but as the pair hike closer they see those walls are more like mountains, and the mega-metropolis is long dead.

records.title: Quiet Life Of The Mute Archmage (OP Archmage/ Academy/ XianXia/ LITRPG/ Mute MC)
records.synopsis: What does it take for a mute girl to climb out of th e slums and defy the very heavens?

records.title: I Regressed 300 Years to Open a Quiet Inn[Cozy, Regression, Romantasy]
First Contact
records.synopsis: Eight Thousand Years after the Glassing of Earth, Terran Descent Humanity has largely become a post-scarcity society based on consent and enjoying life. With the discovery of another ancient race beyond the "Great Gulf", events and history collide to draw the Terran Confederacy into war against a hundred million year old empire that has always won and believes it always will. With allies and enemies of multiple species, the Orion Galactic Arm Spur will be wracked by warfare the likes of which have not been seen. Cracked, harried, wounded, and damaged, Terran Descent Humanity willfully throws itself against the universe itself.

records.title: Chained Lord [LitRPG Tutorial]
records.synopsis: No sane person would choose Apocalypse Difficulty. For Rowan, it was his only option.

records.title: Unbound Ascension – Coreless [System Apocalypse - LitRPG - Weak to Strong]
records.synopsis: What is better: to enter the multiverse gifted with power, or to begin weak and claw your way to strength through blood, will, and relentless effort? When Earth is integrated into the Multiverse, humanity gains stats, skills, and magic—but only a select few are granted System Cores, becoming Core-bearers with a clear path to power.

records.title: Leaving A Legacy (A Xianxia story)
records.synopsis: What happens when a young master from a declining cultivator clan decides to… be a decent human being ?

records.title: The Storm King
records.synopsis: Leon and his father, Artorias, are the last remaining scions of a once powerful and illustrious family of lightning mages. After barely surviving an attack that destroyed their home fifteen years ago, they now live in the dangerous Northern Vales, a desolate wilderness far away from civilization. But those who want them dead are strong, patient, and relentless, and it is only a matter of time before they find the two they seek...

records.title: Engine of Reincarnation [A Serial Rebirth Isekai LitRPG]
records.synopsis: Everyone dies, but I get to live again. And again. And again .

records.title: Diary of a Teenaged Mimic
records.synopsis: Tabitha Diaz fits in, wherever she winds up.

records.title: Loopshard
records.synopsis: Book 1: Completed and rewritten Book 2: Complete Book 3: Ongoing

records.title: Surprisingly Enough(NOT), Common Sense Is Overpowered in Cliché Cultivation World
records.synopsis: Ning finds himself reborn in the world of cultivation. However, as he embarks on this new life, he gradually becomes aware of something amiss. It dawns on him that this realm revolves around a select few individuals, the so-called "protagonists," who endure underestimation and humiliation, only to rise and retaliate following the predictable patterns of clichéd cultivation novels. Suddenly, Ning has a breakthrough revelation: he is an "extra." Freed from the constraints of these clichéd rules that govern the world, he resolves to chart his own path towards immortality, steering clear of predictable tropes and stereotypes. Join Ning on an extraordinary journey as he harnesses his sharp intellect and vast knowledge to ascend to the pinnacle of the cultivation world. Discover how he defies conventions, outsmarts adversaries, and unravels the mysteries of this realm, all while shattering the boundaries of what it means to be a protagonist in a world bursting with limitless possibilities. P.S.: This is a rewrite.

records.title: The Lich King Reincarnates as a Baby
records.synopsis: Lord Dread was the first lich in history, and the greatest magical prodigy the world has ever seen. The Gods themselves feared his potential, and they banished him for it. They should have been more thorough.

records.title: Hocus, Pocus, Hypothesis [A Scientific Isekai]
records.synopsis: The Scientist cared only for the Truth. He will do anything to reach it, even if it means creating an entirely new type of magic based on science.

records.title: Self-Summon [Demon Summoning/Evolution LitRPG]
records.synopsis: Literal starving artist, Angelica Hallow, is suddenly hit on the head by a book while dumpster diving out of desperation. Compelled by the illustrations inside the tome, she recreates one of the intricate circles on the floor of her apartment. Ignorant of the forces she's messing around with, Angelica accidentally activates the magic circle and triggers a Summoning. But rather than any Demon or other supernatural creature, instead, she summoned... herself?!

records.title: City of Desire [Kingdom Building]
records.synopsis: Suffering the machinations of family, Remus is sent to the newly built border city of Greltheaven. A place filled with opportunities but also dangers.

records.title: A Journey of Black and Red
Clara Casewell, Attorney to the Villainess [Vol 1 Complete]
records.synopsis: Clara Casewell is an ambitious up-and-coming associate at an international corporate law firm. Yet underneath her serious lawyerly persona lies a woman with a passion for all sorts of villainess stories. It doesn’t matter how trashy or badly written they are: as long as it’s got a haughty girl and a brooding duke, Clara will devour it like popcorn!

records.title: Naruto: Stormbreaker
records.synopsis: After getting revenge for his murdered sister, he was gifted with a proper deep fry courtesy of the electric chair. Once he was cooked to a well-done crisp, he expected to wake up to fire, brimstone, screaming souls, torture demons with forked tongues, and the same three Nickelback songs on loop. Instead, he woke up somewhere far less expected. Want to know where? Read the novel. Or, you know... just look at the title. I really didn’t plan this part through, did I?

records.title: Cyber Cultivation: When Technology meets Cultivation
records.synopsis: In 2030, Xia Li was cryogenically frozen. In 2532, he woke up to a world transformed.

records.title: Savant Barbarian [LitRPG Adventure, Kingdom(Tribe)-building]
records.synopsis: Among his people, strength is everything. Weakness means death.

records.title: Paladin Of The Forsaken Lands (Monster Crafting "Nature" Paladin Lit-Rpg)Bk 1 Stubbing Aug 1st
records.synopsis: Vrax should be dead by now, And he damn well knows it. Yet he's still here. Delving into the eldritch unknown of the Forsaken Lands, at level zero. Being an overtly picky asshole, and praying for the System to give him the perfect class. Until then he will just have to do his best to outwit or outrun the horrors most other sane adventurers avoid.

records.title: Apocalyptic Shapeshifter — [Shapeshifter litRPG] — Zero-Day Saint
records.synopsis: Zero-Day Saint - Apocalyptic Shapeshifter

records.title: Savage Divinity
records.synopsis: A modern man finds himself reincarnated in the body of a young slave with no skills and quickly fading memories. Follow his journey to find normalcy while living in a savage world, filled with myth and legends, monsters and Demons. In a land where the strong rule, the weak serve, and bloodshed is a way of life, peace is a luxury few can afford.

records.title: Changeling
records.synopsis: Magic came to our world. Portals opened all across the planet, releasing mana and dangerous monsters on the unsuspecting population. Wonder turned to horror. Society was on the verge of collapse, until heroes rose to face the catastrophe. Those fearless men and women wielded the power of mana to enter the portal worlds, plundering their treasures and slaying beasts bullets barely harmed. Through their efforts and sacrifices, mankind stepped into the future. They were called users, or raiders, and they became the champions of mankind.

records.title: The Archmage's Second Life as an Introvert [OP MC, LitRPG]
records.synopsis: What does a decade-long hero’s journey feel like… to an introvert?

records.title: Sublight Drive (Star Wars)
records.synopsis: It is twenty-two years before the Battle of Yavin, and the galaxy is at war.

records.title: The Demon Queen Wants To Live. [Yuri, Progression Fantasy]
records.synopsis: Lysanthia, the strongest Demon Queen, spent centuries trying to die.

records.title: Princess of the Void: An Alien Abduction Romance [Vols 1-5 complete]
records.synopsis: To survive as an alien tyrant's husband, he'll need to grab his new life by the horns.

records.title: God of Trash [Cultivation LitRPG] From Trash-Tier to the Ultimate Trash! [Five Full Books! 5!]
records.synopsis: "Hey, wait! I'm not a god, I'm just a guy who loves trash!"

records.title: Dao of the World Walker (Craft-based Slice of life Xianxia with World Hopping)
records.synopsis: Chen Yang died once.

records.title: Crimson Eternal: An Immortal Death Mage LitRPG Apocalypse
records.synopsis: The main protagonist is unable to die. They can be captured and sealed away, but they cannot die. Do not read if you want the protagonist to be able to die.

records.title: Herald of the Stars - A Warhammer 40k, Rogue Trader Fanfiction
records.synopsis: British plumber, Aldrich Isengrund donates his body to science only to wake up in the far future as the last survivor of a Federation experiment.

records.title: Summoned A Hundred Years Too Late
records.synopsis: After 3,841 days of logins, Alexandra was the only player left.

records.title: Everybody Loves Large Chests
records.synopsis: Everybody Loves Large Chests is now available on Amazon and Audible ! Featuring lots of editorial love and a more enjoyable reading/listening experience!

records.title: Son of Julius Caesar: Rebuilding Rome [Business/Republic building] [Book 1 Complete]
records.synopsis: I wanted nothing more than an ordinary life—free from crushing debt and the endless corporate grind. Instead, I died. And when I opened my eyes, I was in ancient Rome.

records.title: Harry Potter and the Surprisingly Competent History of Magic Professor
records.synopsis: Cassian Rosier is a failure. A near-Squib in one of the Sacred Twenty-Eight families, he’s spent his life as the family’s punching bag... mocked, dismissed, and barely tolerated. But when a simple light spell becomes his last chance to prove himself, Cassian’s world shatters in a way none of them could have imagined.

records.title: I Can See Health Bars [An Eldritch Apocalypse LitRPG]
records.synopsis: The story takes place in a sprawling Eastern metropolis swallowed by energy pollution...

records.title: Into the Unown (Pokemon Fanfiction OC)
records.synopsis: The last thing that Miles remembered was getting hit by a truck before finding himself in the body of a toddler in a world of Pokemon.

records.title: I Built This City [Book 1 complete!]
records.synopsis: Trust in yourself, they said... but which one?

records.title: The Elf Who Would Become A Dragon [Vols 1–3 Complete]
records.synopsis: They made her conform. She made them regret it.

records.title: Noble Blood - A Vampire Reincarnation Story
records.synopsis: What is a noble son supposed to do when he is shunned by the family, sent away to the middle of nowhere? When neither divine intervention nor folk remedy can change the circumstances of his birth?

records.title: Lost and Found (Warhammer 40k SI)
records.synopsis: Lost and Found: Living as a Relic of Ages Past. Aboard a Grand Cruiser once lost now owned by a Rogue Trader dynasty with a heavy Adeptus Mechanicus presence. A soul wakes up shortly after the formation of the Cicatrix Maledictum, in a new unfamiliar body with a diverse suite of implants from the dark age.
